fields.name: smtpHost
fields.whyRequired: Notification and operational mail (alerts, sign-off reminders) are sent through the corporate relay.
fields.expectedSuccessfulOutput: TcpTestSucceeded = True; relay reachable from the production host.

fields.name: smtpPort
fields.whyRequired: Port 587 is the submission port using STARTTLS for authenticated relay.

fields.name: smtpAuth
fields.whyRequired: Authenticated submission prevents open-relay abuse; the password is a vault reference, never inline.
fields.validationCommand: Send a test message via the configured credentials and confirm 235 Authentication successful in the SMTP transcript.
fields.expectedSuccessfulOutput: SMTP AUTH succeeds over STARTTLS; no plaintext password is logged or stored in repo.

fields.name: fromAddress
fields.whyRequired: Outbound mail must use an SPF/DKIM-aligned sender so it is not rejected or spam-filtered.
fields.validationCommand: Send a test mail and inspect the received headers for SPF=pass / DKIM=pass.
fields.expectedSuccessfulOutput: Test mail delivered to a real mailbox with SPF/DKIM alignment.
